---
name: "\U0001F4DD Feedback Report"
about: "\U0001F4A1 Share feedback, suggestions, or usability insights to help us improve
  the project. Use this when something is confusing, hard to find, slow to use, or
  could be clearer/better."
title: "\U0001F4DD Feedback: <Component/Area> — <Concise Summary>"
labels: 'priority: To be determined (TBD), status: Needs triage, type: Feedback'
assignees: tannergolden

---

<!--
Thank you for your feedback!

Please give enough context so we understand the problem, who it affects, and how to improve.
Avoid sharing secrets or personally identifiable information (PII).
-->

## 📌 What this template is for (and not for)

**Use this template for:**  
- Usability concerns (confusing flows, unclear UI)  
- General design or UX feedback not tied to accessibility  
- Suggestions to improve user experience  

**Don’t use this template for:**  
- Reproducible product bugs → use **🐛 Bug Report**  
- Performance issues → use **🚀 Performance Report**  
- Documentation corrections → use **📖 Documentation Report**  
- Accessibility problems → use **♿ Accessibility Report**  
- Requests for new features → use **✨ Feature Request**  
- Security vulnerabilities → follow **SECURITY.md** (responsible disclosure)  

---

## ✍️ Summary
<!-- One or two sentences describing the feedback or idea. -->
<!-- Example: "The onboarding form feels long; splitting into steps would reduce drop-off." -->

## 👥 Who Is Affected
<!-- Audience/persona (e.g., new users, admins, mobile users). Approximate impact if known. -->

## 🔎 Current Experience / Workflow
<!-- Describe what you do today, including any friction points. Mention screens/paths if helpful. -->

## ✅ Desired Outcome
<!-- What would “good” look like? What outcome or behavior are you hoping for? -->

## 📈 Rationale
<!-- Why does this matter? Mention pain points, goals, or metrics (conversion, time-on-task, error rate, support volume). -->

## 📎 Evidence
<!-- Add screenshots, recordings, or links that illustrate the experience. Redact sensitive data. -->

## 🧰 Environment (if applicable)
- Platform: Web / Mobile / Desktop
- Device (for mobile): e.g., iPhone 15 Pro / Pixel 8
- Operating System (OS) & version: e.g., macOS 14.5, Windows 11, iOS 17.5, Android 14
- Web Browser & version: e.g., Chrome 128, Safari 17.5, Firefox 128, Edge 128
- Application version (Semantic Versioning (SemVer)): `x.y.z`

## 🧭 Proposed Direction (Optional)
<!-- Ideas, sketches, or references. -->
<!-- Example: "Split onboarding into 3 steps; auto-save progress; show progress indicator (3/3)." -->

## 🔀 Alternatives Considered (Optional)
<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why they may be weaker. -->

## 🔗 Additional Context / Links
<!-- Related issues, Pull Requests (PRs), discussions, documents, or analytics dashboards. -->

---

### ✅ Reporter Checklist
- [ ] I searched existing issues and did not find a duplicate.
- [ ] I explained who is affected, the current workflow, and the desired outcome.
- [ ] I provided evidence (screenshots/recordings/links) where possible.
- [ ] I removed or obfuscated secrets and personally identifiable information (PII).
